title: Moroccan Flatbread with Bitter Tahini Spread
description: A simple and flavorful flatbread paired with a rich and creamy tahini spread, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: 2. Cut the flatbread into smaller pieces and place on a baking sheet.
3. Drizzle with a little water and sprinkle with salt. Toss to coat.
4. Bake in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
5. In a blender or food processor, blend the tahini and bitter until smooth.
6. With the blender running, slowly add the water until the desired consistency is reached.
7. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
8. Serve the warm flatbread with the tahini spread.
